title: 'Abiyam #0038
definition:
Abijam = "my father is the sea" or "Yah(u) is (my) father"

 1) king of Judah, son and successor of Rehoboam
nasbUsage:
Definition: Abijam = "my father is the sea" or "Yah(u) is (my) father"

 1) king of Judah, son and successor of Rehoboam

    NASB:  father of (the) sea, an Isr. name
